channel.title: Anthropic News
channel.description: Latest news and announcements from Anthropic

item.title: DXC will integrate Claude into the systems banks, airlines, and other regulated industries rely on
item.description: DXC will integrate Claude into the systems banks, airlines, and other regulated industries rely on

item.title: TCS and Anthropic partner to bring Claude to regulated industries
item.description: TCS and Anthropic partner to bring Claude to regulated industries

item.title: Results from the first Anthropic Public Record
item.description: Results from the first Anthropic Public Record

item.title: Statement on the US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
item.description: Statement on the US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5

item.title: Anthropic opens Seoul office and announces new partnerships across the Korean AI ecosystem
item.description: Anthropic opens Seoul office and announces new partnerships across the Korean AI ecosystem

item.title: Claude Science, an AI workbench for scientists, is now available
item.description: Claude Science, an AI workbench for scientists, is now available

item.title: More details on Fable 5’s cyber safeguards and our jailbreak framework
item.description: More details on Fable 5’s cyber safeguards and our jailbreak framework

item.title: Redeploying Fable 5
item.description: Fable 5 returns globally July 1. We're also proposing an industry-wide framework for scoring jailbreak severity, together with Amazon, Microsoft, Google, and other Glasswing partners.

item.title: Introducing Claude Sonnet 5
item.description: Sonnet 5 delivers frontier performance across coding, agents, and professional work at scale.

item.title: Claude Science, an AI workbench for scientists, is now available
item.description: Claude Science is a customizable app that integrates the tools and packages researchers most often use, produces auditable artifacts, and provides flexible access to computing resources.

item.title: Introducing Claude Tag
item.description: Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude.
